scenario.name: Mini PBX Extension Not Found
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1002@pbx.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1002@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1002@pbx.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
